title: Akatz
compiled_truth: Akatz is an external contact at [Eei](companies/eei). Over the corpus period (1999-09-28 to 2001-11-09), Akatz sent 38 and received 65 emails, totalling 103 interactions. Top correspondents: [Elizabeth Sager](people/elizabeth-sager) (24), [Rosteen](people/rosteen-powersrc) (17), [Hemu](people/hemu-dynegy) (16), [Wfhenze](people/wfhenze-jonesday) (16), [Dperlman](people/dperlman-powersrc) (14).
